titleStmt.title: SII 18.235: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 235. (B.K. No. 98 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the temple of Kalamēśvara

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 8th year of the reign of Kamāradēva Ānanda, Bhādrapada s11u. 11, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1254, August 27. The tithi however ended on Wednesday.
It registers a gift of money and a flower-garden made by Malla-seṭṭi of Vijayāpura for the worship of god Gōpāḷ ēva of Hāvēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapratāpacakrava
rtti śrīkaṁnnāradēva vijeyarājyavaruṣada 8 neya yānaṁdasaṁvatsarada bhādra pada su
ddha 11 brihaspativāradaṁdu śrīmadanādiyagrahāraṁ hāvēriya srīgōpāḷadē
vara yārādhanege hūdōṁṭavanuṁ 2 nuṁ salahi yanavarata dēvarige kuṁdade
śrīkāriyava naḍavaṁtāgi vijayūpurada kariya nāgiseṭṭiyara maga mallaseṭṭi
yaru dēvara bhaṇḍāravāgi koṭa gadyāṇa 4 yī honna baḍige hūdōṁṭa
vaṁ māḍi puṟpavanuṁ naḍasuvarū yī dharmmavanuṁ mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ boṁ
marsaruṁ Avara putrapautrādigaḷuṁ mukhyavāgi bhāgavatajanaṁ
gaḷuṁ samastavārikāṟaruṁ varuṣaṁprati Āraydu pra
tipāḷisi naḍasuvaru naḍasade vudāsīnaṁ māḍidaḍe śrī
gōpināthanāṇi . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī gōpīnāthaśaraṇa .
Digital edition of SII 18.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
